_comment: Real-dev-schema template for the contractor Given. Columns match the live Iceberg table molecular_vms_beakon_dev.contractor. The .feature data table overrides the columns that matter per scenario (beakon_record_number / primary_email_address / mobile_number / user_status); the rest are filled from here so the seeded mole row is complete. Traceable for teardown via the bddpoc email.
